purpose: Update phase-02 presentation/util shell rows after bounded route-state repair.

set.targetBehavior: Phase 02 now keeps the source route catalog and shell commands in a dedicated route-state helper that the bootstrap route host uses directly. Home/history tab commands still avoid duplicate destinations, the floating cart action remains shell-owned, and shell chrome still appears only on home/history while the shared top-level state is at the top.
verificationEvidence: Source review: D:/Kotlin2Cangjie/Foodike/app/src/main/java/com/example/foodike/presentation/util/Navigation.kt defines the route graph, shell-owned bottom bar, cart action, and duplicate-safe tab navigation in SetupNavigation/BottomBar.

Target review: entry/src/main/cangjie/ohos_app_cangjie_entry/app/app_router.cj::ShellRouteState, routePath, showsBottomShell, and primaryActionTarget encode the same route ids, duplicate-safe tab/cart commands, and shell gating contract.

Target review: entry/src/main/cangjie/ohos_app_cangjie_entry/app/bootstrap_page.cj::FoodikeBootstrap.applyShellCommand and runPrimaryAction drive the route host through the shared shell-command model instead of ad hoc page transitions.

Test verification: 2026-06-25 manual reproduction of `cjpm test --target aarch64-linux-ohos` in D:/workspace/Foodike/Foodike-Harmony/entry passed with phase02_startup_navigation_test, including shell command and bottom-shell assertions.
set.notes: The target now exposes a dedicated shell-command state model that preserves the source tab/cart command contract and duplicate-safe navigation behavior without waiting for later feature pages.

set.targetBehavior: Phase 02 now represents the source observable shell contract with a dedicated ShellRouteState plus bootstrap-page `@State` fields. Route changes and top-of-list changes both flow through the same state helper, so shell visibility recomputes immediately without resetting scroll-top state on tab/cart commands.
verificationEvidence: Source review: D:/Kotlin2Cangjie/Foodike/app/src/main/java/com/example/foodike/presentation/util/Navigation.kt derives shell visibility from currentBackStackEntryAsState plus LazyListState.firstVisibleItemIndex == 0.

Target review: entry/src/main/cangjie/ohos_app_cangjie_entry/app/bootstrap_page.cj::FoodikeBootstrap.currentRoute and isShellAtTop remain `@State` fields that re-render the shell host immediately when route or top state changes.

Target review: entry/src/main/cangjie/ohos_app_cangjie_entry/app/app_router.cj::ShellRouteState.setTopState and showBottomShell preserve the combined route-plus-top-state visibility rule across shell commands.

Test verification: 2026-06-25 manual reproduction of `cjpm test --target aarch64-linux-ohos` in D:/workspace/Foodike/Foodike-Harmony/entry passed with shellRouteStatePreservesTopFlagAcrossCommands and bottomShellOnlyShowsOnTopLevelHomeAndHistoryRoutes.
set.notes: The earlier simplification was that route commands reset shell-top state. The extracted ShellRouteState now preserves top-state across duplicate-safe tab/cart commands, matching the source observable shell behavior for this phase.
